sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87933" key="prolimna/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προλιμνάζω</orth>, <sense id="n87933.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form a marsh before</tr_> a river, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:22:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.22.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
